# isSoloed

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the app silences all groups other than this group.

## Declaration

```swift
var isSoloed: Bool { get }
```

## Silencing Sounds

- **mute()**: Silences the group.
- **unmute()**: Restores the group’s volume.
- **isMuted**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the app silences the group.
- **solo()**: Silences all other groups.
- **unsolo()**: Restores the other groups’ volume.
